score.description: 0-100. Who they are: traits, track record, execution evidence. A projection of the room, not a vote taken in it. The persistent Founder Score from Memory is one input, not a substitute.

band.description: [low, high]. Thin evidence or an unresolved fork touching this dimension = wide band. Code-side check enforces 0<=low<=score<=high<=100.

cold_start.description: True when scored on public footprint only. Cold start widens the band; it never counts as negative evidence.

evidence_refs.description: Signal ids grounding any movement off the prior. No evidence, no score movement.

position_refs.description: Seat references into the room: 'seat-N/pre', 'seat-N/post', 'debate', 'adjudication' (optionally with a fragment like 'debate#turn-11'); 'bull/pre' etc. for 2-pole rooms. Required (>=1) when the room convened; must be empty when it did not.

room_effect.description: How the room moved this dimension off the prior — which held/refined/conceded position drove it. Empty string in degraded no-room mode.

mandate_refs.description: Thesis field names that shaped this rating (e.g. 'risk_appetite', 'disqualifiers'). The counsel is the mandate's keeper — an office rating cites its charter.

declared.description: True when this rating goes against the mandate's grain. Deviations are allowed but must be declared; an undeclared deviation is a defect.

note.description: Which mandate field is deviated from and what in the record forces it. Non-empty iff declared.

coverage_challenges.description: What the room failed to test on this dimension — an unpressed tension, an unconsulted evidence class, an unargued minority position. Empty when coverage was genuine, and in no-room mode.

open_questions.description: Questions on this dimension no document on file settles, each phrased as its cheapest decisive check. Flow into memo conditions and the diligence log. Never answered here.
